steps.title: Find the Jupiter weight
steps.content:
Jupiter's weight is $252.8\%$ of the Earth weight. Convert the percent to a decimal and multiply:

$$2.528(170.00)=429.76$$

steps.title: Compare Neptune to Jupiter
steps.content:
Find what percent the Neptune weight is of the Jupiter weight:

$$\frac{186.32}{429.76}\cdot 100=43.35$$

steps.title: Choose the closest percent
steps.content: The closest listed value is $43.35$. The answer is A.
